{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Union Intelligence
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Union Intelligence]] panicked on [[Fathom]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
